P00-PROC-0001.evidence: The instruction required creating the following files in `/audit/`: `TIMELINE.md`, `AUDIT_LEDGER.md`, `FINDINGS.md`, `TRACE_MATRIX.md`, `DECISIONS.md`, `ASSUMPTIONS.md`, `EXCEPTIONS.md`, `METRICS.md`, and `ASSURANCE.md`, and ensuring agent-context files point to `/audit/AGENT_BOOT.md`. The file system listing for the `audit` directory confirms the existence of `AGENT_BOOT.md`, but the required ledger files are missing. Since I do not have file creation capabilities, this step cannot be verified as successfully executed.
